---
name: architecture-fit-review
description: Evaluates whether changes align with system architecture, layering, and design principles.
---

# Architecture Fit Review

## Overview
Ensures new code integrates cleanly into existing system design without degrading structure.

## Focus Areas

### System Design Alignment
- Follows established patterns
- No unnecessary new paradigms

### Layering Discipline
- Correct separation of concerns
- No cross-layer leakage

### Abstraction Quality
- Not over-engineered
- Not overly coupled
- Abstractions justified

### Pattern Consistency
- Matches existing idioms
- Avoids fragmented design styles

### Structural Integrity
- No circular dependencies
- Clean module boundaries

## Output Decision
- FITS_ARCHITECTURE
- MINOR_DEVIATION
- ARCHITECTURE_VIOLATION
